name: Buttermilk Cookies W/Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the sugar and shortening until smooth.
2. Beat in the eggs, one at a time, ensuring each is fully incorporated.
3. Gradually add the buttermilk, then the soda, baking powder, salt, and flour, mixing until just combined.
4. Stir in the vanilla extract.
5. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto a greased and floured cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 350°F for 6-8 minutes, or until very light and golden brown.
7. Allow cookies to cool completely before frosting.
Frosting:
1. Gradually mix melted butter (or margarine) into powdered sugar with milk until the desired consistency is reached.
2. Decorate the cooled cookies as desired before the frosting has fully set.
